home.heroSubtitle: Guided and self-paced kayak journeys through the lakes, rivers and ancient pine forests of the regional park.
home.fleetDesc: With 200+ vessels we can put a whole company on the water at once.

routes.title: Unforgettable Kayaking Adventures
routes.lede: Discover the unhurried beauty of the regional park. From gentle lake crossings to winding forest rivers, find the perfect line for your next adventure.
routes.noResults: No routes match the selected filters.

route.flat: calm and glassy, perfect for all ability levels
route.currentTerrain: {terrain}, making this a route for paddlers with some experience
route.terrainDesc: The current is {desc}. Sandy banks appear at regular intervals — perfect for a mid-river picnic, a swim, or simply drifting beneath the trees.

fleet.title: Boats for every crew
fleet.desc: 200+ vessels for water adventures and shore relaxation. Everything you need for a great trip.

kayak.title: Kayak rent
kayak.desc: High-performance kayaks for every crew, from solo paddlers to small groups.

raft.title: Raft rent
raft.desc: Roomy rafts for journeys and corporate retreats — paddles always included.

sup.title: SUP rent
sup.desc: Stable stand-up paddleboards for a calm glide along the lake shoreline.

hotTub.title: Mobile hot tub
hotTub.desc: A heated hot tub by the water with soft LED lighting for evening soaks.

sauna.title: Mobile sauna
sauna.desc: Portable wood-fired sauna delivered lakeside — warm up between paddles.

footer.tagline: Adventure, tranquillity and profound stillness on the water of the regional park.
footer.rights: © {year} Asvėjos baidarių centras · All rights reserved

reservation.modalSubtitle: We'll confirm availability and send details to your contact.
reservation.successBody: We'll reach out via your preferred contact method within a few hours to confirm your booking.
